description:
- A suspicious stash of powerful fireworks that upon closer inspection spell out a story retelling a home invasion that ends in violence.
- This one gives me the heebie jeebies.
- With everything glued down - including the layer of dust - this is a cinematic prop, suggesting a greater environment, contrasted by written narrative.
